expects.description: A human maintainer has approved this delivery-scope exemption from Trust Reconcile's bundle-required enforcement (ADR 0022 §1/§2), recorded as a verified no-agent-delivery-exemption-approval trust.bundle claim.
expects.explore_hint: A human approver authors a Hachure trust.bundle carrying a no-agent-delivery-exemption-approval / delivery-scope claim with status verified, then `flow attach-evidence <run> --gate human-approval-gate --file <bundle> --bundle`.
